title: Lock current truth surface across README/charter/capability matrix/runbook/help
done_when: done when all public docs and CLI outputs agree on current contract

title: Decide async runtime fallback policy
done_when: done when fallback is either removed or explicitly surfaced as blocked/degraded contract

title: Create product-owned goal schema spec
done_when: done when objective/workspace/constraints/done_conditions/verification/budget/approval are versioned

title: Implement goal file parser
done_when: done when goal yaml/json/md loads into validated RunGoal input

title: Add canonical CLI commands run/resume/abort around goal files
done_when: done when help/status/replay support run ids

title: Create run-id based persistence path
done_when: done when runs survive process restarts and are addressable by id

title: Promote RunGoal/RunEvent/RunStatus path into apps runtime
done_when: done when autonomous run path uses core run domain directly

title: Define explicit step model
done_when: done when each run compiles to inspectable steps with ids/types/status

title: Persist step journal into trace
done_when: done when replay can render per-step timeline

title: Replace shallow tool phase with step executor
done_when: done when runtime uses tool adapter operations beyond log/report append

title: Implement inspect/read/search step handlers
done_when: done when planner can gather workspace evidence before mutation

title: Implement mutate/write/replace/remove step handlers with path expectations
done_when: done when mutation steps emit bounded evidence and changed-path summaries

title: Implement verification-command steps
done_when: done when cargo/npm/python build/test/lint/typecheck can be attached to milestones

title: Upgrade report artifacts to step-aware plan/apply/verify/report documents
done_when: done when reports show milestone/step/evidence/failure boundary

title: Implement terminal done-condition evaluation
done_when: done when success requires all declared checks to pass

title: Implement per-milestone verification
done_when: done when milestone advancement is impossible without passing checks

title: Implement repair classification
done_when: done when verification failures map to retryable/non-retryable classes

title: Implement bounded repair loop
done_when: done when repair attempts consume explicit budget and stop deterministically

title: Persist repair attempts and reasons
done_when: done when replay/report show repair history

title: Support operator-readable changed-path and patch preview summaries
done_when: done when replay/report show what changed without raw diff overload

title: Wire tool risk tiers into approval gate
done_when: done when risky steps pause before execution under on-risk/always

title: Implement persisted pending-approval state
done_when: done when status/replay show waiting approval with step context

title: Implement resume after approval
done_when: done when approved runs continue from paused step, not restart whole run

title: Implement abort semantics
done_when: done when abort leaves coherent terminal outcome and report

title: Define budget exhaustion semantics
done_when: done when step/time/token limits yield budget_exhausted terminal outcome

title: Expose budget and approval state in doctor/status/replay
done_when: done when operator can inspect run control state easily

title: Define execution isolation strategy (single-writer lockfile or worktree-per-run)
done_when: done when concurrency contract is explicit and enforced

title: Protect state snapshot against concurrent writers
done_when: done when multi-process writes are prevented or serialized

title: Protect trace log append path
done_when: done when events.jsonl cannot be corrupted by multi-process append

title: Protect memory backends or document single-writer mode
done_when: done when markdown/sqlite behavior is deterministic under chosen contract

title: Serialize or isolate provider session usage
done_when: done when active session cannot be asked concurrently unsafely

title: Remove or surface hidden async-host fallback
done_when: done when configured runtime init failure is operator-visible and policy-consistent

title: Tighten replace_in_file semantics with expected_count/max_count
done_when: done when risky broad replacements are impossible by accident

title: Surface unreadable/skipped files in search/list operations
done_when: done when search results report skips/errors deterministically

title: Add worktree adapter or scm adapter for isolated coding runs
done_when: done when runs can operate in ephemeral worktrees and leave reviewable diffs

title: Create verifier profiles for Rust/Node/Python projects
done_when: done when common dev stacks can be verified with minimal configuration

title: Define workflow-pack contract
done_when: done when user-provided workflow packs have stable schema and allowed-tool/verifier metadata

title: Implement adapter SDK for workflow packs
done_when: done when external workflow adapters plug into one orchestrator contract

title: Support spec-stack inputs (SPEC/PLAN/IMPLEMENT/STATUS/AGENTS)
done_when: done when runs can ingest durable project memory files as source of truth

title: Create app workflow pack
done_when: done when an app scaffold/change goal can run end-to-end

title: Create server/API workflow pack
done_when: done when a server feature goal can run end-to-end

title: Build autonomous eval corpus
done_when: done when representative repos/goals exist for repeated scoring

title: Add trace/artifact scoring checks
done_when: done when runs are scored on outcome plus evidence quality

title: Add release gate for autonomous runs
done_when: done when releases are blocked by failing representative runs

title: Dogfood maintenance workflow on AxonRunner itself
done_when: done when a recurring internal engineering workflow completes through the product

title: Dogfood spec-to-feature workflow
done_when: done when a feature derived from a planning doc is executed end-to-end

title: Trim legacy intent path to debug/migration mode
done_when: done when goal-run is primary and legacy path no longer drives product decisions

title: Write product release checklist for autonomous mode
done_when: done when operator can deploy/use/recover confidently
